title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while out and about with
Matikanefukukitaru...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Look over there, Trainer! What else could that be
but a lucky omen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru points toward a claw machine
filled with Umamusume plushies.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Today's horoscope said my lucky item is a plushie!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The great Shiraoki wanted this encounter to
happen, guiding me here to this very spot!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I just know super-ultra-mega-great fortune will
come my way if a certain lucky trainer wins one
for me!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Of course! I have great faith that you'll reel in a
whole bunch!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I can see it already! You'll be hauling them in by
the boatload! You'll be the envy of all the other
trainers!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
